name: crm-features
description: Sistema de CRM: clientes, pipeline de vendas e interações

endpoints.create: POST /api/clients { name, company?, email?, phone?, segment?, status?, notes? }
endpoints.update: PUT /api/clients/:id { name?, company?, email?, phone?, segment?, status?, notes?, total_spent? }
endpoints.stats: GET /api/clients/stats (total, active, lead, revenue, bySegment, recentActivity)

endpoints.create: POST /api/clients/opportunities { clientId, title, value?, stage?, probability?, expectedCloseDate?, notes? }

opportunities_module.kanban: Frontend em Pipeline.tsx exibe oportunidades em colunas por stage

endpoints.create: POST /api/clients/interactions { clientId, type, subject, notes?, followUpDate? }
